creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
When trying to install 2.2-BETA I would get part way through (from about
17% of bin to part way throughs docs) a PPP install when PPP would exit
"on signal 6". I would then have to start the install again. I ended up
having to FTP BSD with my mac and use floppies :-(

How-To-Repeat: It happened to me everytime I tried a PPP install
